message:
fix(cli,db): harden ack status display, fix migration test, add reconstruct tests

- robot.rs: guard partial ack display against zero-recipient edge case,
  add "acked (N)" fallback when total_recipients is unknown
- schema.rs: use migrate_to_latest (not _base) in idempotency test,
  switch index assertions from sqlite_master to PRAGMA index_list for
  cross-backend compatibility
- lib.rs: add comprehensive tests for doctor reconstruct subcommand
  (CLI parsing, missing storage root, dry-run empty archive, archive
  with project/agent/message data)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
